headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on EPAM Systems, Lowers Price Target to $125
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Jason Kupferberg   maintains EPAM Systems (NYSE:EPAM) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $151 to $125.
